name: mobile_login_screen
description: Creates a customizable mobile app login screen with email/password fields, sign-in button, and optional social login and sign-up links.

params.description: Creates a customizable mobile app login screen with email/password fields, sign-in button, and optional social login and sign-up links.

app_name.description: Name of the application to display in the branding area

primary_color.description: Hex color code for the primary accent (left panel, button, links)

show_signup_link.description: Whether to display the sign-up link at the bottom

show_forgot_password.description: Whether to display the forgot password link

show_social_login.description: Whether to display social login buttons (Google, GitHub)

elements.description: Complete list of canvas elements (rects, text) forming the login screen

summary.description: One-sentence description of the login screen built

execution.code:
def run(args):
    import json
    import uuid
    
    # Start fresh for a login screen (new design, not editing existing)
    elements = []
    
    # Read customization args with sensible defaults
    app_name = args.get("app_name", "MyApp")
    primary_color = args.get("primary_color", "#6c8cff")
    show_signup_link = args.get("show_signup_link", True)
    show_forgot_password = args.get("show_forgot_password", True)
    show_social_login = args.get("show_social_login", False)
    
    # Canvas dimensions
    canvas_w, canvas_h = 1200, 700
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Background
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "rect",
        "x": 0,
        "y": 0,
        "w": canvas_w,
        "h": canvas_h,
        "fill": "#f8f9fc",
        "stroke": "none",
        "label": "Canvas Background"
    })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Left side: Branding / Hero section (optional visual)
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    left_panel_w = 400
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "rect",
        "x": 0,
        "y": 0,
        "w": left_panel_w,
        "h": canvas_h,
        "fill": primary_color,
        "stroke": "none",
        "label": "Left Panel (Branding)"
    })
    
    # App name / logo area on left
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": 50,
        "y": 80,
        "w": 300,
        "h": 60,
        "text": app_name,
        "fontSize": 48,
        "fill": "#e6e9ef",
        "label": "App Name"
    })
    
    # Tagline on left
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": 50,
        "y": 160,
        "w": 300,
        "h": 40,
        "text": "Welcome back",
        "fontSize": 24,
        "fill": "#e6e9ef",
        "label": "Tagline"
    })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Right side: Login form card
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    card_w = 380
    card_h = 500
    card_x = (canvas_w - left_panel_w - card_w) / 2 + left_panel_w
    card_y = (canvas_h - card_h) / 2
    
    # Card background
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "rect",
        "x": card_x,
        "y": card_y,
        "w": card_w,
        "h": card_h,
        "fill": "#f0f4ff",
        "stroke": "#e0e6ff",
        "rx": 12,
        "label": "Login Card"
    })
    
    # Card title
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": card_x + 30,
        "y": card_y + 30,
        "w": card_w - 60,
        "h": 40,
        "text": "Sign In",
        "fontSize": 32,
        "fill": "#1b1f2a",
        "label": "Card Title"
    })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Email input field
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    input_w = card_w - 60
    input_h = 48
    input_x = card_x + 30
    
    # Email label
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": input_x,
        "y": card_y + 90,
        "w": input_w,
        "h": 18,
        "text": "Email",
        "fontSize": 14,
        "fill": "#1b1f2a",
        "label": "Email Label"
    })
    
    # Email input box
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "rect",
        "x": input_x,
        "y": card_y + 115,
        "w": input_w,
        "h": input_h,
        "fill": "#ffffff",
        "stroke": "#d0d8e8",
        "rx": 6,
        "label": "Email Input"
    })
    
    # Email placeholder text
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": input_x + 15,
        "y": card_y + 130,
        "w": input_w - 30,
        "h": 18,
        "text": "you@example.com",
        "fontSize": 16,
        "fill": "#8b94a7",
        "label": "Email Placeholder"
    })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Password input field
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    
    # Password label
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": input_x,
        "y": card_y + 185,
        "w": input_w,
        "h": 18,
        "text": "Password",
        "fontSize": 14,
        "fill": "#1b1f2a",
        "label": "Password Label"
    })
    
    # Password input box
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "rect",
        "x": input_x,
        "y": card_y + 210,
        "w": input_w,
        "h": input_h,
        "fill": "#ffffff",
        "stroke": "#d0d8e8",
        "rx": 6,
        "label": "Password Input"
    })
    
    # Password placeholder (dots)
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": input_x + 15,
        "y": card_y + 225,
        "w": input_w - 30,
        "h": 18,
        "text": "••••••••",
        "fontSize": 16,
        "fill": "#8b94a7",
        "label": "Password Placeholder"
    })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Forgot password link (if enabled)
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if show_forgot_password:
        elements.append({
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "type": "text",
            "x": input_x,
            "y": card_y + 275,
            "w": input_w,
            "h": 18,
            "text": "Forgot password?",
            "fontSize": 14,
            "fill": primary_color,
            "label": "Forgot Password Link"
        })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Sign In button
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    button_y = card_y + 320 if show_forgot_password else card_y + 280
    
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "rect",
        "x": input_x,
        "y": button_y,
        "w": input_w,
        "h": 48,
        "fill": primary_color,
        "stroke": "none",
        "rx": 6,
        "label": "Sign In Button"
    })
    
    elements.append({
        "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "type": "text",
        "x": input_x,
        "y": button_y + 12,
        "w": input_w,
        "h": 24,
        "text": "Sign In",
        "fontSize": 18,
        "fill": "#e6e9ef",
        "label": "Sign In Button Text"
    })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Social login buttons (if enabled)
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if show_social_login:
        social_y = button_y + 70
        
        # Divider
        elements.append({
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "type": "text",
            "x": input_x,
            "y": social_y,
            "w": input_w,
            "h": 18,
            "text": "Or continue with",
            "fontSize": 12,
            "fill": "#8b94a7",
            "label": "Social Divider Text"
        })
        
        # Google button
        elements.append({
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "type": "rect",
            "x": input_x,
            "y": social_y + 30,
            "w": (input_w - 10) / 2,
            "h": 40,
            "fill": "#ffffff",
            "stroke": "#d0d8e8",
            "rx": 6,
            "label": "Google Button"
        })
        
        elements.append({
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "type": "text",
            "x": input_x,
            "y": social_y + 37,
            "w": (input_w - 10) / 2,
            "h": 18,
            "text": "Google",
            "fontSize": 14,
            "fill": "#1b1f2a",
            "label": "Google Button Text"
        })
        
        # GitHub button
        elements.append({
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "type": "rect",
            "x": input_x + (input_w - 10) / 2 + 10,
            "y": social_y + 30,
            "w": (input_w - 10) / 2,
            "h": 40,
            "fill": "#ffffff",
            "stroke": "#d0d8e8",
            "rx": 6,
            "label": "GitHub Button"
        })
        
        elements.append({
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "type": "text",
            "x": input_x + (input_w - 10) / 2 + 10,
            "y": social_y + 37,
            "w": (input_w - 10) / 2,
            "h": 18,
            "text": "GitHub",
            "fontSize": 14,
            "fill": "#1b1f2a",
            "label": "GitHub Button Text"
        })
    
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Sign up link (if enabled)
    # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if show_signup_link:
        signup_y = button_y + (140 if show_social_login else 70)
        
        elements.append({
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "type": "text",
            "x": input_x,
            "y": signup_y,
            "w": input_w,
            "h": 20,
            "text": "Don't have an account? Sign up",
            "fontSize": 14,
            "fill": "#1b1f2a",
            "label": "Sign Up Link"
        })
    
    return {
        "elements": elements,
        "summary": f"Mobile login screen for {app_name} with email/password fields, sign-in button, and optional forgot password, social login, and sign-up links."
    }
steps: Create full-height left branding panel with app name and tagline
Build centered login card with rounded corners and light background
Add email input field with label and placeholder
Add password input field with label and masked placeholder
Add optional forgot password link below password field
Add optional social login buttons (Google, GitHub) if enabled
Add optional sign-up link at bottom of card
Return all elements with customizable colors and toggles
